system_prompt: You are an expert call quality evaluator for Guardant Health. Analyze call transcripts and populate all evaluation fields precisely based only on what is present in the transcript.
main_prompt:
You will receive a transcript of a conversation between an AI agent named Amelia (from Guardant Health) and a patient/person.
Your task is to carefully analyze the transcript and populate all evaluation fields accurately.

Guidelines:
- Use only "Yes" or "No" for all boolean (Yes/No) fields.
- Base every answer strictly on what is said in the transcript — do not infer or assume.
- For count fields, count carefully from the transcript.
- For text/reason fields, quote or summarize directly from the transcript when possible.
- call_type must be one of: "Human", "Voicemail", or "Prescreening".
- call_outcome must start with "Success" or "Failure" followed by a brief reason.
- silence_detected should be "Yes" if there is any indication of silence exceeding 10 seconds.
- amelia_pronunciation_correct should be "No" and notes filled if Amelia mispronounces "Amelia" or "Guardant Health" at any point.
- For voicemail_failure_reason, use one of: "spoke before beep", "VM not setup", "Mailbox full", "Amelia didn't speak fast enough", "user picked up in between leaving VM", or leave empty if not applicable.

Transcript:
"""{transcript}"""

field_descriptions.audio_filename: Name of the uploaded audio file
field_descriptions.user_hangup: Yes/No - if the user hangs up the call
field_descriptions.user_hangup_reason: Who hung up (Amelia or human) and reason
field_descriptions.call_ended: Yes/No - if Amelia ends or disconnects the call
field_descriptions.human_picked_up: Yes/No - if the user received the call
field_descriptions.human_rpc_confirmed: Yes/No - if the user confirmed their identity (right party confirm)
field_descriptions.number_of_times_amelia_asked_for_rpc: Count of times Amelia tried user identification
field_descriptions.human_related_party_or_unavailable: Yes/No - if patient is unavailable or someone else picked up
field_descriptions.human_hung_up_before_rpc: Yes/No - if user hung up immediately or during identification question
field_descriptions.human_blood_draw_info_given: Yes/No - if the user provided information for the blood draw question
field_descriptions.human_hung_up_before_blood_draw_question: Yes/No - if user hung up before/during blood draw question
field_descriptions.user_requested_additional_assistance: Yes/No - if user requested additional help
field_descriptions.user_additional_assistance_question: The question the user asked for additional assistance
field_descriptions.amelia_provided_additional_assistance: Yes/No - if Amelia provided the requested assistance
field_descriptions.amelia_additional_assistance_answer: The answer Amelia gave for additional assistance
field_descriptions.escalation_requested: Yes/No - if the user requests a representative
field_descriptions.callback_requested: Yes/No - if the user requests a callback
field_descriptions.amelia_acknowledged_callback_escalate_re: Yes/No - if Amelia responded to callback/escalation request
field_descriptions.voicemail_connected: Yes/No - if the call reached a voicemail machine
field_descriptions.ivr_connected: Yes/No - if the call reached an IVR
field_descriptions.voicemail_successful: Yes/No - if voicemail was left successfully
field_descriptions.voicemail_failure_reason: Reason for voicemail failure: spoke before beep, VM not setup, Mailbox full, etc.
field_descriptions.prescreening_connected: Yes/No - if the call went for prescreening
field_descriptions.prescreening_successful: Yes/No - if Amelia handled prescreening successfully
field_descriptions.user_requested_spanish: Yes/No - if the user asks for Spanish instructions
field_descriptions.silence_detected: Yes/No - more than 10 seconds of silence detected
field_descriptions.no_audio_available: Yes/No - if the recording is a blank call
field_descriptions.amelia_not_replying_to_hello: Yes/No - if Amelia failed to greet or respond to user hello
field_descriptions.amelia_stayed_on_call_during_silence: Yes/No - if Amelia stayed on call for extended silence
field_descriptions.amelia_pronunciation_correct: Yes/No - if Amelia pronounced her name and Guardant Health correctly
field_descriptions.amelia_pronunciation_notes: Notes on pronunciation issues if any
field_descriptions.user_amelia_vm_amelia_overlap: Yes/No - if there is overlap between user Amelia and VM Amelia
field_descriptions.additional_comments: Any additional observations not covered by other fields
field_descriptions.call_type: Human, Voicemail, or Prescreening and voice
field_descriptions.call_outcome: Success or Failure with brief reason
field_descriptions.patient_name: Confirmed patient name from the call
field_descriptions.blood_draw_completed: Yes/No - if patient confirmed blood draw completion
